name: Steam Canister Pack
description: Back-mounted steam canister pack with tubing and brass fittings.

textToImageTask.prompt: Steampunk steam canister backpack, brass fittings, leather straps, tubing, clean background, multi-view sheet

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Steam canister backpack prop, brass fittings, leather straps, tubing, compact silhouette

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: oxidized brass, worn leather straps, steel canisters, soot marks, realistic materials

styleTexturePrompts.copper-oxide: copper with green patina, aged fittings, worn leather
styleTexturePrompts.industrial-steel: dark steel canisters, minimal brass, rugged industrial look
styleTexturePrompts.leather-gear: heavy leather straps, warm brass, workshop handcrafted feel
